popularStory.headline: Facts about King Bleddyn
popularStory.description:
He was killed by his cousin Rhyns ab (son of ) Owain.

Prince of Deheubarth, MURDERED, King of Gwynedd and of Powys, aka Bledyn ap KYNUYN; Prince (Tywysog) of Deheubarth (of Powys); usurped throne of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys於1025年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys45歲，母親Angharad ferch Maredudd44歲。他於大約1046年與Haer Verch Cyllyn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1075年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年51歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys于1025年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys45岁，母亲Angharad ferch Maredudd44岁。他于大约1046年与Haer Verch Cyllyn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1075年在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年51岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Bleddyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from an ancient byname from blaidd ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -yn. Blaidd was often used in medieval Welsh as a term for a hero.

nameMeanings.name: "Sais"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

en.lifeSummary: When Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys was born in 1025, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, was 45 and his mother, Angharad ferch Maredudd, was 44. He married Haer Verch Cyllyn about 1046, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1075, in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 51, and was buried in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

fr.Of,,Montgomeryshire, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys est né en 1025, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Maredudd, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Haer Verch Cyllyn environ 1046, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1075, à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys 1025 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys 45 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Maredudd 44. Er hat um 1046 in Wales Haer Verch Cyllyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1075 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales und wurde in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys è nato il nel 1025 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Maredudd, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Haer Verch Cyllyn circa 1046, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1075, nel Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powysが1025年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powysは45歳，母Angharad ferch Mareduddは44歳であった。約1046年にウェールズでHaer Verch Cyllynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1075年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルで51歳で死去し，ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys(이)가 1025년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Maredudd(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1046년 웨일스에서 Haer Verch Cyllyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1075년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys nasceu em 1025, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Maredudd, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Haer Verch Cyllyn aproximadamente 1046, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1075, em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales.

ro.Of,,Montgomeryshire, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys родился в 1025 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Maredudd, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Haer Verch Cyllyn около 1046 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1075 г. в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys nació en 1025, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Maredudd, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Haer Verch Cyllyn aproximadamente 1046, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1075, en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales.
